/usr/bin/c++  -mcmodel=large -std=c++23 -g -nostdlib -ffreestanding -fno-use-cxa-atexit -fno-exceptions -fno-builtin -fno-rtti -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fno-asynchronous-unwind-tables -mno-red-zone -static -lgcc -Wl,--wrap=__stack_chk_fail -T/home/PS/PS_git/OS_pj_uefi/kernel/init.ld -g -mgeneral-regs-only -fno-lto -fpermissive -fno-PIC "-DKERNEL_MODE>" "-DPGLV_4>" -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/init.elf.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/init.elf.dir/src/init/init_init.cpp.o CMakeFiles/init.elf.dir/src/init/kernel_mmu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/init.elf.dir/src/init/kernel_load.cpp.o CMakeFiles/init.elf.dir/src/init/init_entry.asm.o CMakeFiles/init.elf.dir/src/init/Interrupts/Sysdef_exception_entries.asm.o CMakeFiles/init.elf.dir/src/init/Interrupts/exceptions_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/init.elf.dir/src/init/heap_alloc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/init.elf.dir/src/init/core_hardwares/init_gop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/init.elf.dir/src/init/core_hardwares/PortDriver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/init.elf.dir/src/init/util/textConsole.cpp.o CMakeFiles/init.elf.dir/src/init/pages_alloc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/init.elf.dir/src/init/panic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/init.elf.dir/src/init/util/kout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/init.elf.dir/src/utils/util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/init.elf.dir/src/init/util/bitmap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/init.elf.dir/src/utils/lock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/init.elf.dir/src/arch/x86_64/Processor/early_bsp_resources.cpp.o CMakeFiles/init.elf.dir/src/os_error_definitions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/init.elf.dir/src/init/info_fill.cpp.o CMakeFiles/init.elf.dir/src/init/mem_loads.cpp.o CMakeFiles/init.elf.dir/src/utils/arch/x86_64/intel_cpuid.cpp.o -o init.elf  /home/PS/PS_git/OS_pj_uefi/kernel/outsbmodules/gnu-efi/x86_64/lib/libefi.a /home/PS/PS_git/OS_pj_uefi/kernel/outsbmodules/gnu-efi/x86_64/gnuefi/libgnuefi.a
